title: safe-termkit
pitch: Generate SAFE notes, cap tables, and dilution reports from structured financing inputs.
keyFeatures: SAFE variants (post-money, pre-money, MFN) payoff and conversion modeling
Cap table engine with option pool, pro-rata, and priced-round conversion
Deterministic dilution reports (JSON + PDF/Markdown render helpers)
Input validation and scenario comparison (best/base/worst) helpers
targetUsers: FinTech and startup-software developers who need programmable SAFE/term-sheet and dilution math in backend services.
